topic: TikTok POV skit — the flight price mind games (EN)

lines.text: POV: you just found a flight for ninety euros.
lines.visualPrompt: excited young person looking at phone smiling, cozy room, relatable

lines.text: So you go make a coffee. What could go wrong?
lines.visualPrompt: person casually making coffee in kitchen, relaxed morning

lines.text: You come back. It's a hundred and seventeen.
lines.visualPrompt: shocked face looking at phone in disbelief, dramatic

lines.text: Refresh. A hundred twelve. Refresh. Up again. The price is playing with you.
lines.visualPrompt: red stock chart shooting up, financial panic, numbers rising fast

lines.text: Airlines change prices dozens of times a day. It's a game, and honestly, you're losing.
lines.visualPrompt: stressed person surrounded by chaotic screens, overwhelmed

lines.text: So let the app play instead. Flight Price Watch tracks the price all day and catches the drop.
lines.visualPrompt: real Flight Price Watch tracker page screen recording

lines.text: It drops. You buy at ninety. And while the price was busy... you were having coffee.
lines.visualPrompt: relaxed happy person sipping coffee smiling, victorious calm

lines.text: Stop gambling with ticket prices. Link in bio.
lines.visualPrompt: traveler walking confidently through airport, golden hour
